_comment: Single source of truth for claude-statusline settings. The renderer (claude-statusline-render.py) reads its defaults from here; the config engine (statusline-config.py) reads types/aliases/constraints from here to validate writes and drive the /statusline menu. Settings are grouped by stat: one group per segment, holding that segment's own 'enable' toggle plus any extra options (display mode, progress bar, thresholds). The on-disk config file holds ONLY the values the user has overridden. To add a new setting, add a leaf node below; every consumer picks it up automatically.

workspace.label: Workspace
workspace.help: The current working directory (last two path components).

enable.label: Show workspace
enable.help: Show the current working directory (last two path components).

branch.label: Git branch
branch.help: The current git branch and whether the tree has uncommitted changes.

enable.label: Show branch
enable.help: Show the current git branch when inside a repository.

dirty.label: Dirty marker
dirty.help: Show a '*' after the branch when the working tree has uncommitted changes (staged or unstaged).

diff.label: Line changes
diff.help: Lines added/removed by the assistant this session.

enable.label: Show line changes
enable.help: Show lines added/removed by the assistant this session (e.g. '+12/-3').

model.label: Model
model.help: The active model and its current reasoning effort.

effort.label: Effort level
effort.help: Show the current reasoning effort (e.g. 'max effort'). Hidden automatically when the model doesn't support an effort level.

cost.label: Session cost
cost.help: The session's running cost in USD.

enable.label: Show session cost
enable.help: Show the session's running cost in USD (e.g. '$1.23').

context.label: Context usage
context.help: Context-window usage, how it's shown, and where it changes colour.

display.label: Display mode
display.help: How to show usage: 'percent' (40%), 'tokens' (the tokens used, e.g. 150K), or 'both' (40% 150K). Falls back to percent when the model doesn't report a window size.

progress_bar.label: Progress bar
progress_bar.help: Show the [████░░░░░░] usage bar before the value.

yellow.label: Yellow threshold
yellow.help: Tokens used at which the context segment turns yellow. Accepts forms like 200000 or 200k.

red.label: Red threshold
red.help: Tokens used at which the context segment turns red. Must be >= the yellow threshold. Accepts forms like 250000 or 250k.

enable.label: Show 5-hour limit
enable.help: Show 5-hour rate-limit usage and time until reset.

burn_rate.label: Burn-rate flag
burn_rate.help: Show a 🔴/🟢 flag after the reset time. 🔴 means your current spend rate will hit 100% before the window resets; 🟢 means you're on pace or have headroom.

enable.label: Show 7-day limit
enable.help: Show 7-day rate-limit usage and time until reset.

burn_rate.label: Burn-rate flag
burn_rate.help: Show a 🔴/🟢 flag after the reset time. 🔴 means your current spend rate will hit 100% before the window resets; 🟢 means you're on pace or have headroom.

constraints.message: red must be >= yellow (the red threshold cannot be lower than the yellow one).
